players.mission: Promised a client a Floor 5 demo environment that is operational and fully tested. It is not operational. It has not been tested. The client arrives at 09:15. AEC considers this someone else's problem.
players.known_secret: What was promised to which client and for how much. AEC would prefer to keep it that way.
